suite.title: HTML 5.2 Plain-HTML Renderer Suite
suite.description: Repository-owned HTML 5.2 tests for static rendering without WPT fixtures or JavaScript execution.

cases.title: Tokenizer emits doctype, paragraph tags, text, and EOF
assertions: The tokenizer preserves the document token order and emits an EOF token.

cases.title: Tokenizer normalizes mixed-case tags and quoted or unquoted attributes
assertions: The tokenizer lowercases tag and attribute names and records boolean attributes with empty values.

cases.title: Tokenizer emits character and comment tokens in source order
assertions: A normal HTML comment is emitted between surrounding character tokens.

cases.title: Tokenizer keeps style content as raw text until the matching end tag
assertions: The greater-than sign inside style content does not terminate markup.

cases.title: Tokenizer marks slash-closed void elements as self-closing
assertions: Slash-closed img and br start tags carry the selfClosing marker.

cases.title: Tokenizer treats unknown markup declarations as bogus comments
assertions: A non-doctype markup declaration is emitted as a comment token.

cases.title: Tokenizer handles unquoted attributes separated by whitespace
assertions: Unquoted attribute values end at whitespace and a trailing boolean attribute is preserved.

cases.title: Tokenizer emits an open comment when EOF is reached
assertions: EOF inside an HTML comment still yields the accumulated comment token.

cases.title: Parser creates implicit html, head, and body elements for text-only input
assertions: Text-only input is wrapped in an implicit html element and body element.

cases.title: Parser preserves explicit html, head, title, and body structure
assertions: Explicit document structure remains in the parsed tree.

cases.title: Parser moves leading metadata elements into the implicit head
assertions: Leading meta and style elements are grouped under head while the paragraph is under body.

cases.title: Parser implicitly closes p before a div start tag
assertions: The div becomes a sibling of the paragraph rather than a paragraph child.

cases.title: Parser closes the first p when a second p starts
assertions: Two p start tags produce sibling paragraph elements.

cases.title: Parser keeps void elements as leaf boxes in phrasing content
assertions: br and img are represented as single leaf elements.

cases.title: Parser injects text-box content for text input values
assertions: A text input value is represented as child text for static rendering.

cases.title: Parser injects the default submit button label when value is absent
assertions: A submit input without value receives the default static label.

cases.title: Parser reuses an explicit body when creating implicit html
assertions: An explicit body is parented under the implicit html element without double-wrapping.

cases.title: Parser normalizes uppercase element names
assertions: Uppercase source tag names appear as lowercase element names in the parsed tree.

cases.title: Parser keeps body style elements in the explicit body tree
assertions: A style element authored inside an explicit body remains in body order.

cases.title: Parser treats script content as raw text and does not execute it
assertions: Script text is parsed as raw text and no script execution is required.

cases.title: Render heading and paragraph defaults with author styling
assertions: Headings and paragraphs render in normal document flow.

cases.title: Render hidden elements as not displayed
assertions: The hidden element does not paint after the visible block.

cases.title: Render preformatted whitespace
assertions: The pre element preserves line breaks and indentation.

cases.title: Render figure and figcaption layout
assertions: Figure content and figcaption render as grouped content.

cases.title: Render styled horizontal rule
assertions: A styled hr paints as a block separator between paragraphs.

cases.title: Render canvas fallback content without script execution
assertions: Canvas fallback content is available to the static renderer.

cases.title: Render root and body background propagation
assertions: Root, body, and child backgrounds paint in the expected order.

cases.title: Render margin, border, padding, and content boxes
assertions: The CSS box model controls painted content geometry.

cases.title: Render inline-block elements in a single line
assertions: Inline-block boxes participate in inline formatting without text gaps.

cases.title: Render cascade and specificity interactions
assertions: Type, class, and ID selectors combine through cascade and specificity.

cases.title: Render absolutely positioned children inside a positioned ancestor
assertions: Absolutely positioned boxes paint at their declared offsets.

cases.title: Render float and clear interactions
assertions: The clear block is placed below the preceding float.

cases.title: Render unordered list markers and item flow
assertions: List items render with default marker placement.

cases.title: Render ordered list start attribute
assertions: Ordered list markers honor the start attribute in static rendering.

cases.title: Render a simple separated-border table
assertions: Table rows and cells render with separate border spacing.

cases.title: Render a collapsed-border table
assertions: Collapsed table borders paint without separated gaps.

cases.title: Render a local SVG image resource through img
assertions: A local SVG resource is resolved and painted as replaced image content.

cases.title: Render inline SVG content
assertions: Inline SVG is boxed and painted as replaced content.

cases.title: Render open details content
assertions: Open details content is visible below its summary.

cases.title: Render closed details static state
assertions: Closed details content follows the renderer's current static-state behavior.

cases.title: Parser preserves caption, column group, and table section order
assertions: Caption, colgroup, thead, tbody, and tfoot elements remain in source order in the DOM dump.

cases.title: Parser preserves table cell span and header attributes
assertions: Rowspan, colspan, id, scope, and headers attributes are available to table semantics and layout.

cases.title: Parser exposes loose table cells for layout recovery
assertions: Loose td children are visible in the DOM dump before the layout layer creates anonymous table rows.

cases.title: Parser preserves all HTML 5.2 input type states
assertions: Hidden, text, search, tel, url, email, password, date, month, week, time, datetime-local, number, range, color, checkbox, radio, file, submit, image, reset, button, and default text states are represented.

cases.title: Parser preserves form-associated control attributes
assertions: Labels, fieldsets, legends, buttons, external form attributes, and output associations remain inspectable without script execution.

cases.title: Parser preserves select, datalist, textarea, progress, and meter widgets
assertions: Option grouping, selected and multiple states, textarea text, progress values, and meter values are preserved.

cases.title: Render table section groups with distinct styling
assertions: Thead, tbody, and tfoot rows are laid out as table rows with distinct cell backgrounds.

cases.title: Render rowspan and colspan table cells
assertions: Rowspan and colspan cells reserve the expected table grid area.

cases.title: Render a single-cell table row with colspan
assertions: A row containing one table cell with colspan still reserves the spanned table grid columns.

cases.title: Render table columns with different widths
assertions: Cells with narrow, medium, and wide classes produce visibly different column widths.

cases.title: Render table cell horizontal and vertical alignment
assertions: Table-cell text aligns left/top, center/middle, and right/bottom according to CSS.

cases.title: Render loose table cells through anonymous table row layout
assertions: Direct td children of a table are rendered in a recovered row-like table layout.

cases.title: Render text-like input values
assertions: Text, search, email, URL, telephone, and password input values paint in static form controls.

cases.title: Render button input states and button element
assertions: Submit, reset, button input states and the button element paint as static clickable controls.

cases.title: Render checkbox and radio input states
assertions: Checked and unchecked checkbox and radio controls produce distinct static boxes.

cases.title: Render date, numeric, range, color, and file input states
assertions: Date, month, week, time, datetime-local, number, range, color, and file controls paint stable static boxes.

cases.title: Render select and textarea controls
assertions: Select, multiple select, and textarea widgets render as static form-control boxes.

cases.title: Render fieldset and legend grouping
assertions: Fieldset border, legend content, and descendant controls paint as grouped form content.

cases.title: Render progress and meter static widgets
assertions: Progress and meter elements render stable static boxes with fallback text available.

cases.title: Render disabled, readonly, and required form attributes
assertions: Disabled, readonly, and required attributes are selectable and produce distinct static styling.

cases.title: Render a grid containing every HTML 5.2 input state
assertions: Every HTML 5.2 input state appears in one static-rendering fixture, with hidden inputs omitted from paint by default styling.

cases.title: Classify local, data URI, and missing image resources
assertions: Image src values are classified as existing local files, data URIs, or missing local files without network access.

cases.title: Classify picture, source, img, and srcset resource candidates
assertions: Picture source and img fallback srcset candidates are logged separately with descriptors.

cases.title: Classify media poster, source, and track resources
assertions: Video poster, source children, audio src, and text track src values are classified without media playback.

cases.title: Classify object, embed, and iframe resources
assertions: Object data, embed src, and iframe src resources are logged with local existence and static renderer disposition.

cases.title: Resolve resources against the first base href
assertions: Relative image and source candidates resolve against the document base element.

cases.title: Classify input type image resources
assertions: Image submit button src values are logged as local existing or local missing resources.

cases.title: Classify resources inside canvas fallback content
assertions: Image resources inside canvas fallback content remain visible to static resource classification.

cases.title: Classify multiple img srcset candidates
assertions: Each srcset candidate is logged with its width or density descriptor.

cases.title: Classify link stylesheet, icon, and preload resources
assertions: Link href resources are logged by role while preserving local-only resolution.

cases.title: Classify remote resources as network-blocked
assertions: HTTP and HTTPS resource URLs are reported as blocked and are not fetched by the resource-log oracle.

cases.title: Render local SVG img resource with explicit dimensions
assertions: A local SVG image resource paints inside an explicitly sized img element.

cases.title: Render data URI image resource
assertions: A data URI SVG image paints as replaced image content without external resource access.

cases.title: Render broken image resource state
assertions: A missing local image paints the renderer's broken-image static state without crashing.

cases.title: Render picture fallback img content
assertions: Picture source candidates are inert in the current static renderer while the img fallback paints.

cases.title: Render object data image resource
assertions: An object element with image data paints as replaced object content and suppresses fallback children.

cases.title: Render unsupported object fallback content
assertions: An object element with unsupported data keeps and paints fallback content.

cases.title: Render iframe static placeholder
assertions: Iframe content is not navigated, but its static replaced-content placeholder box is painted.

cases.title: Render media elements as static boxes
assertions: Video and audio elements paint static media boxes without playback or remote loading.

cases.title: Render canvas fallback content containing an image
assertions: Canvas fallback content remains visible to the static renderer and can include local image resources.

cases.title: Render embed as a static resource placeholder
assertions: Embed paints a static placeholder box while its src is tracked through resource-log cases.

cases.title: Render attribute selectors used by HTML fixtures
assertions: Attribute selectors for presence, exact value, token list, and language prefix affect visible boxes.

cases.title: Render CSS units, percentage widths, and currentColor
assertions: Length units, percentage sizing, transparent backgrounds, and currentColor borders resolve consistently.

cases.title: Render display values and overflow clipping
assertions: Inline-block content participates in flow and overflow hidden clips excess paint.

cases.title: Render whitespace collapsing and preformatted line height
assertions: Normal whitespace collapses while preformatted whitespace and line-height preserve block rhythm.

cases.title: Render CSS display table, list, and input styling
assertions: CSS display table boxes, list item styling, and form control author styles render together.

cases.title: Render style attribute cascade and inherited text color
assertions: Inline style attributes override author rules and descendant text inherits the resolved color.

cases.title: Render visible text-level semantic elements in inline flow
assertions: Common phrasing elements remain inline and their visible font, color, baseline, and highlighting effects paint in source order.

cases.title: Parse ruby, rt, and rp fallback content
assertions: Ruby base text, annotation text, and parenthesis fallback nodes are preserved in the parsed tree without script.

cases.title: Render dir and bdo bidirectional controls
assertions: RTL spans and bdo controls reserve and paint inline runs distinctly from surrounding LTR text.

cases.title: Preserve CJK text content through parsing
assertions: UTF-8 CJK text content is preserved as text nodes for future glyph-backed line breaking tests.

cases.title: Render Arabic and Latin bidirectional inline text
assertions: Arabic and Latin runs paint in stable positions in both normal and rtl-directed blocks.

cases.title: Render combining marks and precomposed accented text
assertions: Combining marks and precomposed accented characters affect measured text runs without script.

cases.title: Render br, wbr, and non-breaking spaces
assertions: Explicit line breaks, word break opportunities, and non-breaking spaces produce stable line boxes.

cases.title: Parse ins and del edit elements with citation metadata
assertions: Insertion and deletion elements preserve their text, cite, and datetime attributes in the static DOM.

cases.title: Render positioned stacking with z-index order
assertions: Positioned boxes with z-index paint in front-to-back order independent of source order.

cases.title: Render opacity over overlapping boxes
assertions: Opacity creates a blended overlap region while preserving the opaque sibling box.

cases.title: Render border radius and outline paint
assertions: Rounded borders, outlines, and nested rounded backgrounds paint without clipping the surrounding canvas.

cases.title: Render background clipping across border and content boxes
assertions: Background color, padding, border, and content backgrounds produce distinct painted regions.

cases.title: Render inline background fragments across line boxes
assertions: Inline backgrounds and borders fragment over multiple wrapped line boxes.

cases.title: Render table background layers and empty cells
assertions: Table, row group, row, cell, and transparent empty-cell backgrounds paint in stable layer order.

cases.title: Render scaled image resources in paint order
assertions: The same local SVG image can paint at two CSS sizes inside one containing block.

cases.title: Render nested background, border, and content paint order
assertions: Nested element backgrounds, borders, and inline content paint from ancestor backgrounds through descendant content.

cases.title: Parse doctype, charset metadata, title, and language setup
assertions: A minimal document setup keeps doctype-triggered document structure, charset metadata, title, language, and body content stable.

cases.title: Parse character references and microsyntax-bearing elements
assertions: Character reference spelling in text, decoded ampersands in attributes, and time/data microsyntax attributes are captured deterministically.

cases.title: Parse document metadata elements and base metadata
assertions: html, head, title, base, meta, link, and style elements remain in metadata order before body content.

cases.title: Classify metadata link resources against base href
assertions: Stylesheet and icon link resources resolve against base href and remain network-blocked in the static resource oracle.

cases.title: Parse anchor links, targets, rel values, and base URL metadata
assertions: Anchor href, target, rel, hreflang, download, and fragment target metadata are preserved without navigation.

cases.title: Render sectioning and heading elements in static flow
assertions: header, nav, article, section, aside, heading, paragraph, and footer boxes render in source flow.

cases.title: Parse all tabular data element categories
assertions: caption, colgroup, col, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, th, td, scope, and headers metadata stay in table order.

cases.title: Parse static global interaction attributes
assertions: accesskey, contenteditable, draggable, spellcheck, and tabindex attributes are preserved as static metadata.

cases.title: Render open details and dialog static states
assertions: Open details and open dialog content paint as static interactive element states without event processing.

cases.title: Render UA defaults and simple presentational hints
assertions: Heading, paragraph, b/i defaults, and table presentational hints produce a deterministic static render.

cases.title: Parse XHTML-shaped document with XML prolog and namespace attributes
assertions: XML prolog text handling, xmlns attributes, xml:lang, slash-closed void elements, and body content are captured deterministically.

cases.title: Parse XHTML-style foreign content self-closing elements
assertions: SVG and MathML namespace attributes and XHTML-style self-closing children remain stable in the static tree.

cases.title: Render obsolete center, font, and strike markup statically
assertions: Obsolete center, font, and strike markup remains parseable and paints with deterministic static fallback styling.

cases.title: Parse legacy table presentational attributes
assertions: Legacy align, valign, bgcolor, border, cellpadding, cellspacing, width, and height attributes remain visible to compatibility code.

cases.title: Render deeply nested block content without crashing
assertions: Deeply nested block boxes lay out and paint within the normal timeout budget.

cases.title: Parse long attributes without truncation or crashes
assertions: Long attribute values and normal text content remain in the parsed tree without excessive work.

cases.title: Classify remote resources as blocked in sandbox stress input
assertions: Remote stylesheet, image, iframe, and object resources are classified as blocked and are never fetched.

cases.title: Render many inline-block siblings deterministically
assertions: Many sibling inline-block boxes wrap and paint consistently across repeated suite runs.

cases.title: Render line break and inline replaced void boundary regression
assertions: A br-created line boundary followed by an inline image and text paints without losing surrounding inline content.

cases.title: Shrink row flex items instead of stacking them
assertions: A row flex container shrinks oversized direct children onto one horizontal line.

cases.title: Lay out nested row flex content inside column flex fallback
assertions: A nested row flex container reached through the inline-block fallback keeps its columns on the same horizontal line.

cases.title: Preserve surrogate pairs while breaking words
assertions: A supplementary Unicode character remains one inline text fragment when word-break permits per-character breaks.
